name: Spanish Rice and Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Uncooked regular long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef in a skillet over medium heat until brown; drain and remove from skillet.
2. Heat oil in the same skillet over medium heat.
3. Cook rice and onion in the oil, stirring frequently, until rice is golden brown and onions are tender.
4. Stir in beef and remaining ingredients (tomato sauce).
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender.
